# Dr. Sheesha Dubai

> Premium flavours lounge in Al Karama, Dubai, UAE.

## About

Dr. Sheesha is a premium flavours (hookah) lounge offering exotic shisha flavours, light bites, mocktails, and private events. The brand aesthetic is luxury black and gold.

## Location

- Address: Dr Sheesha, 112 Za'abeel St — Al Karama, Dubai, UAE
- Coordinates: 25.2481, 55.3066
- Hours: Daily, 12:00 PM – 6:00 AM

## Contact

- Phone: +971 56 671 1730
- Reservations: https://drsheesha.com/contact
- Email: info@drsheesha.com

## Website Pages

- Home: https://drsheesha.com/
- About: https://drsheesha.com/about
- Digital menu: https://qr.mydigimenu.com/c2764751-64d6-4175-9d56-2d3b67d239d4
- Events: https://drsheesha.com/events
- Gallery: https://drsheesha.com/gallery
- Contact & reservations: https://drsheesha.com/contact

## Keywords

shisha lounge Dubai, hookah bar Al Karama, premium flavours UAE, Dr Sheesha
